headline: Edison CEO Calls Steyer's Anti-Utility Comments 'Unfortunate'
summary: Edison International CEO Pedro Pizarro spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. He pushed back against California governor candidate Tom Steyer's call to lower rates.
